title: jatropha variifolia
intro: Jatropha variifolia, a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, is native to tropical Africa and is commonly known as the "variegated stinking navelwort". The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Jatropha variifolia include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a purgative. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
